name: BUBBLE GRID
conditioned_path: pop-it and bubble-wrap ASMR loops that deliver a pop hit on every tap
mechanic: A grid of soft bubble circles fills the canvas; tap each to pop it with a satisfying synthesized micro-burst. Bubbles refill slowly in waves after the grid is cleared, giving a definite full-pop moment then a gentle reset.

name: SLIME STRETCH
conditioned_path: slime-stretching ASMR reels where the pull-and-snap rhythm is the entire hook
mechanic: Drag a blob of generative slime upward; it stretches with elastic resistance and synthesized squeak. Release to snap it back with a satisfying thwack. The texture shifts color as it cools — a self-contained stretch-and-settle loop that ends after ten pulls.

name: SAND POUR
conditioned_path: kinetic-sand ASMR videos where the slow pour and piling crunch is the whole loop
mechanic: Tap and hold anywhere to pour a stream of particle sand that piles with soft crunch audio. Release to stop. The pile settles physics-first with a mound shape; the canvas holds one beautiful pile before gently dispersing and ending the session.

name: RIPPLE POND
conditioned_path: water-ripple ASMR clips where each tap-drop spreads concentric rings and a resonant plop
mechanic: Tap anywhere on a still water surface to drop a ripple with a deep synthesized plop. Rings expand and overlap, playing harmonic tones when two collide. After twelve taps the pond slowly stills and dims, signaling the end of the session.

name: PEEL SHEET
conditioned_path: protective-film peeling and screen-protector removal ASMR that delivers a slow tear-crackle payoff
mechanic: Drag a corner of a simulated protective film slowly across the canvas; it peels with procedural crinkle audio and a satisfying ripping visual. Peel the entire sheet in one unbroken motion for a complete-session reward tone.

name: CRUNCH STAMP
conditioned_path: packing-foam and crunch-squish ASMR where the thumb pressing down is the whole satisfaction
mechanic: Press and slowly release each packing-foam cell on a grid; each cell crumples inward with a crunch sound scaled to how hard you press. Softer press = softer crunch. Fill all twenty cells to complete the sheet and end the session.

name: GOO SWIPE
conditioned_path: slime-wiping and putty-spread ASMR where dragging a slow streak of goo across a surface is the hook
mechanic: Drag your thumb to smear a thick stripe of generative goo across the canvas, leaving a glossy trail with a wet-drag audio cue. Swipe stripes until the entire canvas is covered in one solid color — then the screen exhales and the session ends.

name: GRAIN RAKE
conditioned_path: zen-garden and sand-rake ASMR where drawing clean lines through granules gives a tactile reset
mechanic: Drag slowly through a field of procedural sand particles; a rake leaves parallel furrows with a soft bristle-on-grain audio. Crossing old furrows erases them. Fill the canvas with clean parallel lines to complete the garden and end the session.

name: SOAP SQUEEZE
conditioned_path: soap-cutting and glycerin-squish ASMR where pressing a waxy bar and hearing it crumble is the entire loop
mechanic: Tap to press a procedural soap bar that deforms under your thumb with a chalky squish sound. Each press leaves a thumb-shaped dent; ten presses fully crumble the bar into a pile of shavings. The crumble animation is the reward that ends the session.

name: FROST SCRATCH
conditioned_path: frost-window and fogged-glass scratching ASMR where revealing what is underneath gives the squeak-and-reveal payoff
mechanic: Drag across a frost-covered canvas to scratch away frost particles with a high-pitched scrape audio. The clear path widens as you drag faster or slower, pitch-shifting with speed. Uncover the full canvas to reveal a soft glow beneath and end the session.

name: POP STREAK
conditioned_path: pop-it challenge videos where the speed of clearing an entire board is measured and dared
mechanic: A pop-it board appears. Tap every bubble as fast as possible to clear the grid. Your time is stamped and shareable as a dare. Each round adds one extra row, raising the ceiling but never the floor.

name: TEXTURE TAP
conditioned_path: random-texture ASMR scrolls where each new surface delivers a fresh tactile-audio hit before the feed moves on
mechanic: A new procedurally-generated surface fills the screen every fifteen seconds: corduroy, velvet, bark, mesh. Tap anywhere to hear and feel the texture respond with unique synthesized audio. Five textures complete the session.

name: WAX MELT
conditioned_path: wax-melting and candle-drip ASMR where the slow inevitability of the drip is hypnotic
mechanic: Tap the top of a procedural wax pillar to ignite it; heat radiates downward in a slow melt with drip audio cues. Swipe to rotate the pillar and guide the drip. The candle fully melts over ninety seconds, then the screen fades to a soft glow.

name: TAP RAIN
conditioned_path: rain-on-surface ASMR where each drop landing triggers an individual soft tap sound
mechanic: Rain drops fall randomly onto the canvas, each emitting a synthesized tap on impact. Slide your thumb along the bottom to tilt the canvas left or right, directing the flow into a pool. When the pool fills, the rain slows to a stop and the session ends.

name: SQUISH ROW
conditioned_path: squish-toy speed-run videos where cramming every toy in a row as fast as possible is the dare
mechanic: A row of squishy toys appears. Press each in order from left to right before it reinflates. Speed up across five rounds; the reinflation timer shrinks. Score is your fastest clean sweep.

name: INK DROP
conditioned_path: ink-in-water ASMR where a slow bloom of color spreading through liquid is the entire satisfaction
mechanic: Tap anywhere on a water surface to drop a bead of ink; it blooms outward in procedural fluid simulation with a soft hiss. Each tap adds a new color that bleeds into the last. Ten drops create a full-canvas tie-dye — then the animation slowly stills.

name: VELCRO RIP
conditioned_path: velcro-ripping ASMR speed clips where the tear length determines the sound hit
mechanic: Drag across a velcro strip as fast as possible; the rip sound scales in pitch and crackle intensity with your drag speed. Score is peak drag speed in pixels-per-second. Three rips per session, best score is the shareable dare.

name: WRAP & REST
conditioned_path: bubble-wrap ASMR loops that play endlessly — the game version ends on its own terms instead
mechanic: A single large sheet of bubble wrap fills the canvas. Pop at your own pace — no timer, no score. After the last bubble pops the sheet folds itself away with a soft rustle and a gentle done-tone plays. The session has an actual end.

name: SOUND SHAPE
conditioned_path: sound-reactive ASMR and Cymatics videos where sound visibly reshapes sand or water into patterns
mechanic: Tap a tone button to emit a synthesized frequency; the particle field on screen rearranges into the standing-wave pattern for that tone. Choose from five tones. Hold the last tone until the pattern locks and hums into stillness.

name: CRINKLE PRESS
conditioned_path: crinkle-paper and foil-pressing ASMR where the slow compress-and-release of a surface is the sensory payload
mechanic: Press and slowly release anywhere on a procedural foil surface; it dents with a high-frequency crinkle audio scaled to press pressure. Lighter presses give delicate whisper crinkles; hard presses give a satisfying full crumple. Fifteen presses smooth the foil back flat and end the session.
